_comment: FfmpegTool default config — edit freely. CLI args override these values.

extraction._jpeg_quality_note: 1=best quality/largest files, 31=worst/smallest. Value 2 = near-lossless. Recommended: 5-8 for balanced quality/speed

filter._blur_note: Laplacian variance. Lower = more frames removed. Recommended: 60-120
filter._similarity_note: pHash similarity 0.0-1.0. Frames >= this are considered duplicate. 0.70 = keep frames 30%+ different
filter._dedup_method_note: phash=fast (recommended), ssim=slower but more accurate (use for <500 frames)
filter._phash_size_note: pHash grid size. Higher = more precise but slower. Valid range: 8-32

scorer._enabled_note: Set true to score frames aesthetically and select top-N after filtering
scorer._top_n_note: How many best-scoring frames to copy into top_frames/ folder

output._ratio_note: Used in naming_pattern as {ratio}, e.g. '9x16' or '16x9'

hardware._encoder_note: auto = detect best available. nvenc=NVIDIA, qsv=Intel, amf=AMD, cpu=x264 fallback
hardware._enable_hwaccel_note: Set false to always use CPU (useful for debugging or if hwaccel causes issues)

batch._probe_note: Run ffprobe pre-flight scan on all videos before batch starts. Detects bad files early.
